name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual billing audits cause significant time loss. We generate automated client billing audit reports instead of manual auditing processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual billing audits are time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual billing audits are time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual billing audits cause significant time loss. We generate automated client billing audit reports instead of manual auditing processes using spreadsheets.
